definition: actuator/valve accessory that is actuated by a current signal from one system and transmits power as a pneumatic signal to a second system

definition_ml.en: actuator/valve accessory that is actuated by a current signal from one system and transmits power as a pneumatic signal to a second system
definition_ml.de: Zubehör für Ventile/Antriebe, das von einem Stromsignal von einem System getrieben Leistung als pneumatisches Signal an ein zweites System abgibt

note: In ANSI/ISA 75.05.01-2000 an I/P converter is called transducer

note_ml.en: In ANSI/ISA 75.05.01-2000 an I/P converter is called transducer

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: actuator/valve accessory that is actuated by a current signal from one system and transmits power as a pneumatic signal to a second system
raw_properties.MDC_P008.en: In ANSI/ISA 75.05.01-2000 an I/P converter is called transducer
